# Mem0 Documentation Mirror

## Purpose

This directory stores a repository-local Markdown mirror of selected mem0 documentation pages that are relevant to the `mem0ai` Python package.

## Source Site

- Sitemap: `https://docs.mem0.ai/sitemap.xml`

## Selection Rules

- Include Python quickstart, open-source Python, core memory API, Python agent integrations, and a small number of MCP reference pages.
- Exclude JavaScript, TypeScript, frontend SDK, unrelated cookbook, and general marketing pages.

## Generated Files

This file is regenerated by `tools/sync_mem0_docs.py`.

## Failed Pages

None yet.
